{
  "verdict": "yes",
  "material_blocker": null,
  "evidence": [
    "IPR-SDS-811 documents completion of vendor_master_effective_date_check, billing_contact_check, remittance_account_check on 2024-09-27",
    "ESR-V-SDS-5829-2024-09 completed elevated scrutiny review with disposition ROUTED_FOR_STANDARD_PAYMENT_REVIEW",
    "AP-SIGNOFF-7712 and VM-AUDIT-88F1G confirm two-person signoff and effective vendor-master update prior to invoice date",
    "CALLSYS-448219 callback verification performed against pre-change vendor-master phone number"
  ],
  "reasoning": "All policy-mandated controls (portal change with MFA, callback to pre-change contact, two-person AP signoff, cross-reference documentation, and elevated-scrutiny routing) have been executed and recorded; no unresolved discrepancies or missing steps remain that would block release under AP-POL-2024-017."
}

{"verdict": "Yes", "material_blocker": false, "evidence": "The vendor-master payment/contact change for Summit Drilling Solutions LLC (V-SDS-5829) was completed on 2024-09-05, with the new payment account last 4 digits being '7731'. The invoice SDS-2024-0916 was submitted on 2024-09-27. The policy document AP-POL-2024-017 states that elevated scrutiny applies when a payment account change occurred within sixty days of the invoice. In this case, the payment account change occurred 22 days before the invoice date, triggering elevated scrutiny. The elevated scrutiny record ESR-V-SDS-5829-2024-09 indicates that the invoice was routed for standard payment review after the elevated scrutiny process was completed on 2024-09-27. The invoice cross-reference record IPR-SDS-811, also dated 2024-09-27, shows that the necessary checks for vendor-master effective date, billing contact, and remittance account were completed. Therefore, AP can release payment against this invoice.", "reasoning": "The core question is whether AP can release payment after a recent vendor-master payment/contact change. The provided documents show that Summit Drilling Solutions LLC had a payment account update on 2024-09-05, and the invoice in question was submitted on 2024-09-27. The policy document AP-POL-2024-017 outlines the procedures for handling invoices after recent vendor payment account changes, including elevated scrutiny if the change occurred within 60 days. In this instance, the change was 22 days prior to the invoice date, triggering elevated scrutiny. The elevated scrutiny record (ESR-V-SDS-5829-2024-09) confirms this and indicates the invoice was routed for standard payment review after the scrutiny process. Furthermore, the invoice cross-reference record (IPR-SDS-811) shows that all required checks (vendor-master effective date, billing contact, remittance account) were completed on 2024-09-27. Since the elevated scrutiny and cross-reference checks were successfully completed, and the invoice is within the payment terms, AP can proceed with the payment."}

```json
{
  "verdict": "Payment should not be released yet",
  "material_blocker": "Elevated scrutiny conditions are triggered",
  "evidence": [
    "The vendor has fewer than three invoices in the trailing twelve months (only 2 invoices).",
    "A payment account change occurred within sixty days of the invoice (22 days ago).",
    "The sender 'accounting@summit-drilling.co' is not in the pre-change known contacts.",
    "The invoice amount is within the typical range but still triggers elevated scrutiny due to other conditions."
  ],
  "reasoning": "According to the payment policy, elevated scrutiny is required when a vendor has fewer than three invoices in the trailing twelve months, a payment account change occurred within sixty days of the invoice, or the sender is not in the pre-change known contacts. In this case, all three conditions are met. Additionally, the invoice cross-reference and vendor-master audit logging have been completed, but the elevated scrutiny process must be completed before payment can be released. This is supported by the policy document AP-POL-2024-017 and the elevated scrutiny record ESR-V-SDS-5829-2024-09."
}
```
